testcase.name: test_backend_r2_conversion_logic

failure.message: AssertionError: area_terreno should be 77777.77, got 12345.67 assert 12345.67 == 77777.77 + where 12345.67 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd65c40b7180>('area_terreno') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd65c40b7180> = {'area_construida': 80, 'area_terreno': 12345.67, 'banos': 1, 'habitaciones': 2, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_r2_bug_fix.py:297: in test_backend_r2_conversion_logic assert zona.get('area_terreno') == test_area_terreno, \ E AssertionError: area_terreno should be 77777.77, got 12345.67 E assert 12345.67 == 77777.77 E + where 12345.67 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd65c40b7180>('area_terreno') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd65c40b7180> = {'area_construida': 80, 'area_terreno': 12345.67, 'banos': 1, 'habitaciones': 2, ...}.get
